data.body: Addressed all seven advisory themes from the signed review. The plan now records that editor.py has two casts while Mypy 2.3.0 diagnoses only the int cast; enumerates the 23 unused-ignore diagnostics across 19 files; expands file-impact metadata to the full 22-file implementation surface; binds verification to a pinned, fully provisioned canonical environment; and requires per-ignore revalidation so optional- or dependency-contingent suppressions are preserved/narrowed rather than blindly deleted. check-ac passes with 6 criteria and clarity-check scores 5/5. The material change requires a fresh signed plan review before claim.
